Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 231 

STAY_2_IND_SW 

LABEL: Two Midnight Stay Indicator 

DESCRIPTION: MEDPAR 2 Day Midnight Stay Indicator Switch 

SHORT NAME: STAY_2_IND_SW 

LONG NAME: STAY_2_IND_SW 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: NCH 

VALUES: Y = Yes, the beneficiary received outpatient services within the hospital, prior to admission 
N = No outpatient services immediately prior to admission 

COMMENT: CMS monitors the
